# vendor/

This directory contains git submodules for external dependencies
that are not available on PyPI.

## python-mbtiles2compactcache

Source: https://github.com/ltbam/python-mbtiles2compactcache

Populate with:
    git submodule update --init --recursive

Expected path after init:
    python-mbtiles2compactcache/code/mbtiles2compactcache.py
